digest.en: US President Donald Trump seems unlikely to extend the ceasefire with Iran as the deadline looms. Iranian signals on talks are mixed after the US seized a ship. US crude futures have fallen as investors reassess US-Iran risks ahead of the ceasefire deadline.
digest.hi: दक्षिण लेबनान में इस्राइली हमले में छह लोग घायल हो गए। ईरान ने कहा है कि धमकियों के साये में वार्ता नहीं होगी। आदिवासी समुदायों के अधिकारों व स्वास्थ्य की रक्षा पर यूएन फ़ोरम में चर्चा हो रही है।

articles.title: Iran War Live News Updates: Trump Unlikely to Extend Ceasefire as Deadline Looms
articles.summary: US President Trump is unlikely to extend the ceasefire in Iran as the deadline looms, according to reports. The move would likely escalate tensions in the region, where a fragile truce has held since January.

articles.title: Iran sends mixed signals on talks after US seizes ship
articles.summary: Iran sent mixed signals on talks after the US seized one of its ships. The move has added to the uncertainty surrounding the Middle East crisis, with Iran's stance on negotiations remaining unclear.

articles.title: Who Is John Ternus, Apple's New CEO?
articles.summary: John Ternus became Apple's new CEO after a 2013 promotion to vice president of hardware engineering. He has been instrumental in designing Apple's Mac and iPad products. John Ternus became a vice president of hardware engineering in 2013.

articles.title: US crude futures fall as investors reassess US-Iran risks ahead of ceasefire deadline
articles.summary: US crude futures fell as investors reassessed risks ahead of the Iran ceasefire deadline. The drop was driven by concerns over potential disruptions to global oil supplies. US crude futures fall as investors reassess US-Iran risks ahead of ceasefire deadline.

articles.title: EU eyes Ukraine loan, Israeli settler sanctions, after Hungarian election
articles.summary: The EU is considering a loan to Ukraine and sanctions on Israeli settlers after the ouster of Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban. The move marks a shift in EU foreign policy following Orban's departure.

articles.title: FBI Director Kash Patel sues Atlantic for ‘false’ reporting on drinking
articles.summary: FBI Director Kash Patel sued The Atlantic for defamation over allegations of excessive drinking. Patel denies the claims and is seeking $250 million in damages. The Atlantic defends its reporting as Kash Patel denies allegations and files a $250m US defamation lawsuit.

articles.title: Trump boasts on ‘winning war’ on social media posts
articles.summary: Donald Trump claimed to be winning a war on social media. He posted multiple comments throughout the day. Donald Trump has released various social media comments throughout the day, preaching about winning the war.

articles.title: What to know about the next round of US-Iran talks in Pakistan
articles.summary: The US and Iran will have direct talks in Pakistan on Tuesday. Iran's attendance is uncertain. The US and Iran are supposed to have another round of direct talks in Pakistan on Tuesday, but will the Iranians skip?

articles.title: Ukraine, Short on Troops, Is Turning to Robots to Help Its War Efforts
articles.summary: Ukraine uses unmanned ground vehicles armed with bombs or guns to carry out attacks and protect soldiers. Ukraine is using unmanned ground vehicles armed with bombs, guns or rockets to carry out attacks and keep its soldiers out of harm’s way.

articles.title: U.S.-Iran talks are uncertain as ceasefire is set to expire
articles.summary: Iran has indicated it may not attend fresh talks with the U. S. as a ceasefire set to expire. A temporary ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah in Lebanon appears to be holding. The U. and Iran had agreed to meet in Doha, but Iran's participation is now uncertain.

articles.title: What we know about the Iranian ship seized by the US
articles.summary: The US intercepted an Iranian ship entering the Gulf as part of its naval blockade, according to US President Donald Trump. The US has intercepted an Iranian ship entering the Gulf as part of its naval blockade, US President Donald Trump has said.

articles.title: A Decisive Win Raises Bulgarians’ Hopes for Change
articles.summary: Former Bulgarian President Rumen Radev won a decisive election victory, giving the country a chance for stability and an end to corruption that has hindered its growth. Radev's win has raised hopes for change in Bulgaria.

articles.title: Ahead Of Pak Talks, Trump Says Iran Deal Will Be "Far Better" Than Obama Nuke Deal
articles.summary: Donald Trump said a new Iran deal would be better than the Obama nuke deal. He criticized the Joint Comprehensive Plan of Action. Donald Trump on Monday escalated his criticism of "The Iran Nuclear Deal", asserting that any new deal under his administration would be "far better" than the Joint Comprehensive Plan of Action (JCPOA).

articles.title: Mexico to Investigate Security Role of 2 U.S. Officials Killed in Crash
articles.summary: Mexico will investigate the security role of two US officials killed in a crash. The inquiry will focus on national security laws. President Claudia Sheinbaum said the inquiry would focus on whether the involvement of the Americans in a drug-fighting operation violated Mexico’s national security laws and sovereignty.

articles.title: Trump denies being 'under pressure' to make Iran deal ahead of Wednesday ceasefire deadline
articles.summary: US President Trump denied being under pressure to make a deal with Iran ahead of a ceasefire deadline. He made the statement amid rising tensions with Iran. The deadline was set for Wednesday.

articles.title: The Saudi-Pakistani Defense Pact and U.S. Force Posture in the Gulf
articles.summary: The Georgetown Journal of International Affairs published an article on the Saudi-Pakistani Defense Pact. The piece also examined the current US force posture in the Gulf, providing analysis on the strategic implications.

articles.title: "You Are Entering Military Blockade": US' Hormuz Action With Machinegun
articles.summary: A US soldier pointed a machinegun at a vessel near Iran in the Hormuz waterway. The incident occurred during a military blockade. A US soldier points a heavy-calibre machinegun at a vessel in the waterway near Iran.

articles.title: Trump's "I'm Winning War By A Lot" Claim As Uncertainty Looms Over Pak Talks
articles.summary: US President Donald Trump claimed victory in the Pak-Afghan peace talks, stating "I'm winning war by a lot." The first session of the talks ended without a deal, with uncertainty surrounding the outcome. The US and Pakistan have been discussing a potential peace agreement for months, but no agreement has been reached.

articles.title: Doval’s Riyadh visit on PM’s instructions, part of government outreach to Gulf: MEA
articles.summary: Indian National Security Adviser Doval visited Riyadh on Prime Minister's instructions as part of government outreach to Gulf countries. He discussed India-Saudi cooperation with Saudi Foreign Minister. In a statement, the Saudi Ministry of Foreign Affairs said that the talks between the Saudi Foreign Minister and Mr.

articles.title: Starmer says he would't have appointed Mandelson as US envoy if he'd known he failed vetting process
articles.summary: Keir Starmer told the House of Commons he would not have appointed Peter Mandelson as US envoy if he had known Mandelson failed his security vetting. Starmer said he was not informed of the failure.

articles.title: ‘Lots of bombs’ to fall on Iran if Wednesday deadline missed
articles.summary: Israel warned Iran that bombs will fall if a Wednesday deadline is missed. ‘Lots of bombs’ to fall on Iran if Wednesday deadline missed.

articles.title: इस्राइली हमले में दक्षिण लेबनान में छह घायल; ईरान बोला- धमकियों के साये में नहीं होगी वार्ता

articles.summary: ईरान के मोहम्मद बग़र ग़ालिबाफ़ ने बताया कि अमेरिका के साथ बातचीत में पेच फंसा है. इस्लामाबाद में अमेरिका फिर से ईरान के साथ बातचीत के लिए तैयार है, लेकिन ईरान की भागीदारी अभी तक साफ़ नहीं है.

articles.summary: लकी बिष्ट ने दावा किया है कि नेपाल में तुर्की एंबेसी कूटनीति नहीं, बल्कि धार्मिक कट्टरता का दरवाजा है. इस दावे के पीछे के कारणों का खुलासा नहीं हुआ है.

articles.title: क्या नौसैनिक नाकाबंदी सच में असरदार होती है?
articles.summary: समुद्री नाकाबंदी का मक़सद किसी देश को झुकने के लिए मज़बूर करना होता है, लेकिन इससे मानवीय संकट भी गहराते हैं. प्रथम विश्वयुद्ध और द्वितीय विश्वयुद्ध से लेकर ग़ज़ा तक कई घटनाएं हुई हैं जिनमें नाकाबंदी का इस्तेमाल किया गया.

articles.title: मिडिल ईस्ट तनाव के बीच भारत की सक्रिय कूटनीति: अजीत डोभाल ने सऊदी नेतृत्व से की अहम बातचीत
articles.summary: भारत के राष्ट्रीय सुरक्षा सलाहकार अजीत डोभाल ने सऊदी अरब के नेतृत्व से महत्वपूर्ण बातचीत की। सऊदी अरब के किंग सलमान ने डोभाल को अपने प्रांत में आमंत्रित किया। इस दौरान दोनों नेताओं ने मध्य पूर्व के स्थिति पर चर्चा की।

articles.title: नंदीग्राम में चुनाव आयोग के 'इन तर्कों' से कटे नामों में 95 फ़ीसदी मतदाता मुसलमान- ग्राउंड रिपोर्ट
articles.summary: नंदीग्राम में चुनाव आयोग ने 95 फ़ीसदी कटे मतदाताओं के नामों में मुसलमानों की संख्या को लॉजिकल डिस्क्रिपेंसी में शामिल किया है. नंदीग्राम में 95 फ़ीसदी कटे मतदाताओं के नाम मुसलमान हैं, जो कि पश्चिम बंगाल विधानसभा चुनाव में एसआईआर के विवाद को बढ़ावा दे रहे हैं.
